/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk/lib -o libdmxusb.dylib -install_name @rpath/libdmxusb.dylib CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/dmxusb_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/__/__/interfaces/qlcioplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/__/__/interfaces/rdmprotocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/__/__/midi/src/common/midiprotocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/dmxinterface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/dmxusb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/dmxusbconfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/dmxusbopenrx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/dmxusbwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/enttecdmxusbopen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/enttecdmxusbpro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/stageprofi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/vinceusbdmx512.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/euroliteusbdmxpro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/nanodmx.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/qtserial-interface.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dmxusb.dir/libftdi-interface.cpp.o" -iframework /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/libftdi/1.5_2/lib/libftdi1.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/libusb/1.0.27/lib/libusb-1.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtSerialPort.framework/QtSerialPort /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
